title: thelypteris subandina
intro: Thelypteris subandina is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, also known as a type of tropical forest fern. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris subandina include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. It has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, acting as an antiseptic, and possessing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
